name: wat321
description: Real-time Claude & Codex status bar widgets: session usage, weekly limits, and more

wat321.enableClaude.markdownDescription: Enable Claude usage and session token widgets. Changes apply immediately.

wat321.autoCompactThreshold.markdownDescription:
**Display-only override** for the auto-compact ceiling shown in the Claude session token widget. This does NOT modify Claude Code's actual auto-compact behavior - it only changes what percentage WAT321 uses as the ceiling on its bar.

- `0` (default) = read from your Claude settings
- `10`-`100` = custom display threshold as a percentage (e.g. `85` = 85%)

To change Claude's real auto-compact behavior, edit `~/.claude/settings.json` directly.

wat321.enableCodex.markdownDescription: Enable Codex usage and session token widgets. Widgets are hidden automatically if Codex CLI is not installed. Changes apply immediately.

enumDescriptions: Automatic - Full when only one provider is active, Compact when both are active
Full progress bars (10 blocks) with all details
Compact progress bars (5 blocks) for usage, text-only for session tokens
Text-only view, progress bars remain in tooltips on hover
wat321.displayMode.markdownDescription: Status bar display density. Auto adjusts based on how many providers are active. Changes apply immediately.

wat321.statusBarPriority.markdownDescription: Base priority for WAT321 status bar items. Higher values appear further left. Adjust if widgets overlap with other extensions. *Requires window reload.*

wat321.clearAllData.markdownDescription: **Reset WAT321** - Check this box to clear all WAT321 settings and stored data. This will reset all options to defaults and remove cooldown timestamps and welcome flags from `~/.wat321/`. A confirmation dialog will appear before any changes are made.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run lint && tsc
scripts.package: npm run build && npx vsce package
